query:
-- Summary of cost issues by category
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN s.monthlyCost = 49.00 THEN '$49 Placeholder'
    WHEN s.monthlyCost = 0 AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN '$0 Cost with Revenue'
    WHEN s.monthlyCost > s.monthlyRevenue AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN 'Negative Margin'
    ELSE 'Other Issue'
  END as issue_type,
  COUNT(*) as service_count,
  ROUND(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 2) as total_cost,
  ROUND(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue), 2) as total_revenue,
  ROUND(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost), 2) as net_margin
FROM services s
WHERE 
  (s.monthlyCost = 49.00)
  OR (s.monthlyCost = 0 AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0)
  OR (s.monthlyCost > s.monthlyRevenue AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0)
GROUP BY issue_type
ORDER BY net_margin ASC;
command:

-- Summary of cost issues by category
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN s.monthlyCost = 49.00 THEN '$49 Placeholder'
    WHEN s.monthlyCost = 0 AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN '$0 Cost with Revenue'
    WHEN s.monthlyCost > s.monthlyRevenue AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN 'Negative Margin'
    ELSE 'Other Issue'
  END as issue_type,
  COUNT(*) as service_count,
  ROUND(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 2) as total_cost,
  ROUND(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue), 2) as total_revenue,
  ROUND(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost), 2) as net_margin
FROM services s
WHERE 
  (s.monthlyCost = 49.00)
  OR (s.monthlyCost = 0 AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0)
  OR (s.monthlyCost > s.monthlyRevenue AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0)
GROUP BY issue_type
ORDER BY net_margin ASC;
